description:
Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, identify the safest and most dangerous antifungal co-medications for a patient taking Axitinib. Determine the interaction traffic light colors for Fluconazole, Itraconazole, and Voriconazole. Create a file at /sdcard/antifungal_ranking.txt containing the interaction color for each drug, a statement identifying the safest drug (where Green/Yellow are safer than Orange/Red), and a statement identifying the most dangerous drug.

Use the following format for the file:
Fluconazole: [Color]
Itraconazole: [Color]
Voriconazole: [Color]
Safest: [Drug Name]
Most Dangerous: [Drug Name]
